examples: The worker was bound to the master by a mutual contract that either one could repudiate, and the relationship was conceptualized as one of partnership.
He would repudiate all debts incurred by his son.
He used his position to repudiate the charge.
One of their leaders declared: "We repudiate the Dail", the Irish parliament, which accepted the compromise agreement.
"I absolutely repudiate such comments, " Mr. McCain declared, and the press corps tut-tutted its approval.
